description: A measure of cover, abundance, and diversity of algae that provides habitat and shelter for understory species. Source: GOOS Essential Ocean Variable specification sheet, v2.0, March 2025. Vocabulary status and discussion — NERC EXV: https://github.com/nvs-vocabs/EXV/blob/main/README.md; ENVO minting: https://github.com/EnvironmentOntology/envo/pull/1568.
name: Macroalgal canopy cover and composition
